title:
Unskippable. Unblockable.
Actually appreciated.
subtitle: Your ad funds something people genuinely need — and reaches them at a moment of full attention. No ad-blockers, no doom-scrolling past. Just gratitude and dwell time.

headerPhoto.alt: A tampon styled on coral fabric — every free COVERED pack is funded by a brand's advertising
headerPhoto.caption: Your brand, at the moment it matters.

benefits.title: Exceptional dwell time
benefits.desc: Up to 76 seconds of undivided attention while your ad funds their product — no scrolling past, no skipping.

benefits.title: Gratitude moments
benefits.desc: Reaching consumers at a moment of real need creates positive brand association money can't usually buy.

benefits.title: First-party data
benefits.desc: GDPR-compliant interaction metrics: dwell time, click-throughs, conversions and post-campaign reports by location.

benefits.title: High-footfall placement
benefits.desc: Universities, stadiums, transport hubs and busy retail locations — targeted, contextual and local-friendly.

benefits.title: Trust uplift
benefits.desc: Being the brand that made it free earns real trust and warmth — the kind of association traditional media can't buy.

benefits.title: Unskippable by design
benefits.desc: A physical presence no ad-blocker can touch, wrapped in a social mission your CSR team will love.

chips: Privacy by design — built to UK GDPR & PECR standards
formHint: Goes straight to the team — we usually reply within a couple of days. See our privacy note for how we handle it.
